channel.title: SeaVigil alerts
channel.description: New high-severity illegal-fishing leads: foreign or unauthorized vessels going dark or transshipping, from Global Fishing Watch events.

item.title: encounter: TWN in Chinese Exclusive Economic Zone
item.description: FUHJYI NO 6 (TWN), foreign vessel, no authorization on record. Authorization: no_record. Event time 2026-06-27T19:00:00.000Z.
